zones.title: Meadow
zones.mood: Open grass, wildflowers, warm sun, and the small flying things that drift between blooms.

zones.title: Woodland
zones.mood: Trees holding their own quiet, leaf litter underfoot, and creatures that prefer the cover of branches.

zones.title: Pond
zones.mood: Still water and soft edges, where everything that breathes through skin or gills tends to gather.

zones.title: Sky
zones.mood: The air above the other zones, where wings and weather pass through.

zones.title: Soil
zones.mood: The quiet layer underfoot, where fungi, decomposers, and slow lives work beneath the leaves.

zones.title: Urban
zones.mood: Sidewalks, walls, parks, and the wildlife that has learned to live alongside people.

zones.title: Elsewhere
zones.mood: Everything else -- the finds that wander past the edges of the other zones.
